requiredCorrections.note: Prominently display and visually emphasize the contact CTA (Phone/Email), ideally in its own contrasting bar or highlight, not only in small text among details.
Add a full-width verification/trust band at the bottom with clear agency identity, RA/regulation info, and employment verification marks.
Reduce friction/interference at the bottom right: do not allow QR, contact info, and detail text to overlap or collide; integrate QR design into the information band.
Create a stronger candidate-facing hook (PROJECT + COUNTRY) as the main headline, not just salary/country; e.g. 'NATIONAL GRID PROJECT — KUWAIT ENGINEERING'.
